description: Detect SQL injection vulnerability in user input handling

findings.message: User input concatenated directly into SQL query without parameterization

description: Detect race condition in concurrent state update

findings.message: Shared mutable state accessed without synchronization, potential race condition

description: Detect memory leak from unclosed event listener

findings.message: Event listener registered but never removed, causing memory leak

description: Detect missing error boundary in async chain

findings.message: Promise chain lacks catch handler, unhandled rejection possible
Consider using try/catch with async/await for clarity

description: Detect SOLID violation: class with multiple responsibilities

findings.message: Class handles both data persistence and business logic, violating SRP
Extract persistence logic into separate repository class

description: Detect performance regression from O(n^2) algorithm

findings.message: Nested loop creates O(n^2) complexity, consider using Set or Map for O(n) lookup
Array.includes inside loop could be replaced with Set.has
